title: Iterative acylation on mature lasso peptides by widespread acetyltransferases
summary: Discovery and characterization of GNATs that iteratively acylate mature lasso peptides, and generation of lipolasso peptides through structure-based engineering

class_ii.characteristic: Two Lys residues (typically Lys4 and Lys10)

sequence_similarity_network.iatt_containing_cluster: Separated from others at 40% identity threshold
sequence_similarity_network.lasso_peptide_co_occurrence: Only GNATs within IatT cluster co-occur with lasso biosynthetic genes

peptide_characteristics.core_peptide: Contains Gly1 and Glu8 for macrolactamization

structural_insights: Identified key residues for two-step acetylation
Showed binding pose changes between acetylation steps

step_1.target: First Lys (e.g., Lys4 in loop motif)

step_2.target: Second Lys (e.g., Lys10 in ring motif)
step_2.challenge: Requires significant substrate binding pocket rearrangement

iterative_modification_mechanism.binding_adaptations: Enzyme adjusts binding geometry between steps

experimental_validation.albt_comparison: IatT shares 54% sequence identity with AlbT over 93% coverage
experimental_validation.functional_difference: IatT performs iterative acylation while AlbT performs monoacetylation

engineering_outcomes.monoacetylation_variants: Successfully generated with longer chain acyl groups
engineering_outcomes.diacylation_variants: Successfully generated with longer chain acyl groups
engineering_outcomes.lipolasso_peptides: New class of ribosomal lipopeptides created

lipolasso_peptide_generation.definition: Lasso peptides with iteratively installed longer-chain fatty acyl modifications
lipolasso_peptide_generation.significance: New-to-nature compounds not found in nature

validation_experiments.in_vitro_reconstitution: Enzymatic reconstitution of IatT with lasso peptide substrates
validation_experiments.mass_spectrometry: Confirmed acetylation and acylation with different chain lengths

generalizability_assessment.prediction: Engineering strategy applicable to other GNAT-encoding RiPP BGCs
generalizability_assessment.scope: Can be applied to any RiPP biosynthetic gene cluster with GNAT
generalizability_assessment.expected_outcome: Enable efficient diversification of ribosomal lipopeptides

biotechnological_applications.variant_library: Generation of diverse lasso peptide variants
biotechnological_applications.bioactivity_enhancement: Lipidation may improve cell penetration or bioactivity

catalytic_mechanism_insights.key_finding: First demonstration of iterative catalysis on mature 3D RiPPs
catalytic_mechanism_insights.mechanism: Enzyme accommodates 3D substrate while performing multiple catalytic steps
catalytic_mechanism_insights.residue_roles: Identified specific residues for each acetylation step
catalytic_mechanism_insights.cooperativity: Residues work cooperatively across two distinct reactions

prior_paradigm_challenged.traditional_belief: Iterative PTMs only on linear peptides
prior_paradigm_challenged.new_evidence: GNATs demonstrate iterative modification on mature lasso peptides

structure_details: Substrate positioning for each acetylation step

ripp_engineering_implications.enzyme_promiscuity: GNATs show flexibility in substrate accommodation

chemical_diversity_expansion.structure_activity_relationships: New chemical space for SAR studies

future_directions.enzyme_engineering: Further optimization for different acyl substrates
future_directions.organism_engineering: Develop heterologous expression systems for lipoproduct generation
future_directions.industrial_applications: Scale-up to produce lipolasso peptides for drug development

ripp_superfamily_impact.gnat_prevalence: GNATs are widely distributed in GNAT superfamily
ripp_superfamily_impact.broader_applicability: Strategy applicable beyond lasso peptides to other GNAT-containing RiPPs
ripp_superfamily_impact.catalytic_diversity: Expands known catalytic capabilities of GNAT enzymes
